text: shyr hshyrym 'shr lshlmh
yshqny mnshyqvt fyhv khy-tvbym ddykh myyn
lrych shmnykh tvbym shmn tvrq shmkh 'l-khn 'lmvt 'hbvkh
mshkhny 'chrykh nrvtsh hby'ny hmlkh chdryv ngylh vnshmchh bkh nzkhyrh ddykh myyn myshrym 'hbvkh    s
shchvrh 'ny vn'vh bnvt yrvshlm kh'hly qdr khyry'vt shlmh
'l-tr'vny sh'ny shchrchrt shshzftny hshmsh bny 'my nchrv-by shmny ntrh 't-hkhrmym khrmy shly l' ntrty
hgydh ly sh'hbh nfshy 'ykhh tr'h 'ykhh trbyts btshrym shlmh 'hyh kh'tyh 'l 'dry chbrykh
'm-l' td'y lkh hyfh bnshym ts'y-lkh b'qby hts'n vr'y 't-gdytykh 'l mshkhnvt hr'ym    s
lssty brkhby fr'h dmytykh r'yty
n'vv lchyykh btrym tsv'rkh bchrvzym
tvry zhb n'shh-lkh 'm nqdvt hkhsf
'd-shhmlkh bmsbv nrdy ntn rychv
tsrvr hmr  dvdy ly byn shdy ylyn
'shkhl hkhfr  dvdy ly bkhrmy 'yn gdy    s
hnkh yfh r'yty hnkh yfh 'ynykh yvnym
hnkh yfh dvdy 'f n'ym 'f-'rshnv r'nnh
qrvt btynv 'rzym [rchytnv kh] (rhytnv q) brvtym
'ny chbtslt hshrvn shvshnt h'mqym
khshvshnh byn hchvchym khn r'yty byn hbnvt
khtfvch b'tsy hy'r khn dvdy byn hbnym btslv chmdty vyshbty vfryv mtvq lchkhy
hby'ny 'l-byt hyyn vdglv 'ly 'hbh
smkhvny b'shyshvt rfdvny btfvchym khy-chvlt 'hbh 'ny
shm'lv tcht lr'shy vymynv tchbqny
hshb'ty 'tkhm bnvt yrvshlm btsb'vt 'v b'ylvt hshdh 'm-t'yrv  v'm-t'vrrv 't-h'hbh 'd shtchfts    s
qvl dvdy hnh-zh b' mdlg 'l-hhrym mqfts 'l-hgb'vt
dvmh dvdy ltsby 'v l'fr h'ylym hnh-zh 'vmd 'chr khtlnv mshgych mn-hchlnvt mtsyts mn-hchrkhym
'nh dvdy v'mr ly qvmy lkh r'yty yfty vlkhy-lkh
khy-hnh [hstv kh] (hstyv q) 'br hgshm chlf hlkh lv
hntsnym nr'v b'rts 't hzmyr hgy' vqvl htvr nshm' b'rtsnv
ht'nh chnth fgyh vhgfnym  smdr ntnv rych qvmy [lkhy kh] (lkh q) r'yty yfty vlkhy-lkh    s
yvnty bchgvy hsl' bstr hmdrgh hr'yny 't-mr'ykh hshmy'yny 't-qvlkh khy-qvlkh 'rb vmr'ykh n'vh    s
'chzv-lnv shv'lym shv'lym qtnym mchblym khrmym vkhrmynv smdr
dvdy ly v'ny lv hr'h bshvshnym
'd shyfvch hyvm vnsv htsllym sb dmh-lkh dvdy ltsby 'v l'fr h'ylym 'l-hry btr    s
'l-mshkhby blylvt bqshty 't sh'hbh nfshy bqshtyv vl' mts'tyv
'qvmh n' v'svbbh b'yr bshvqym vbrchbvt 'bqshh 't sh'hbh nfshy bqshtyv vl' mts'tyv
mts'vny hshmrym hsbbym b'yr 't sh'hbh nfshy r'ytm
khm't sh'brty mhm 'd shmts'ty 't sh'hbh nfshy 'chztyv vl' 'rfnv 'd-shhby'tyv 'l-byt 'my v'l-chdr hvrty
hshb'ty 'tkhm bnvt yrvshlm btsb'vt 'v b'ylvt hshdh 'm-t'yrv  v'm-t'vrrv 't-h'hbh 'd shtchfts    s
my z't 'lh mn-hmdbr khtymrvt 'shn mqtrt mvr vlbvnh mkhl 'bqt rvkhl
hnh mttv shlshlmh shshym gbrym sbyb lh mgbry yshr'l
khlm  'chzy chrb mlmdy mlchmh 'ysh chrbv 'l-yrkhv mfchd blylvt    s
'fryvn 'shh lv hmlkh shlmh m'tsy hlbnvn
'mvdyv 'shh khsf rfydtv zhb mrkhbv 'rgmn tvkhv rtsvf 'hbh mbnvt yrvshlm
ts'ynh  vr'ynh bnvt tsyvn bmlkh shlmh b'trh sh'trh-lv 'mv byvm chtntv vbyvm shmcht lbv    s
hnkh yfh r'yty hnkh yfh 'ynykh yvnym mb'd ltsmtkh sh'rkh kh'dr h'zym shglshv mhr gl'd
shnykh kh'dr hqtsvbvt sh'lv mn-hrchtsh shkhlm mt'ymvt vshkhlh 'yn bhm
khchvt hshny shfttykh vmdbrykh n'vh khflch hrmvn rqtkh mb'd ltsmtkh
khmgdl  dvyd tsv'rkh bnvy ltlfyvt 'lf hmgn tlvy 'lyv khl shlty hgbvrym
shny shdykh khshny 'frym t'vmy tsbyh hrv'ym bshvshnym
'd shyfvch hyvm vnsv htsllym 'lkh ly 'l-hr hmvr v'l-gb't hlbvnh
khlkh yfh r'yty vmvm 'yn bkh    s
'ty mlbnvn khlh 'ty mlbnvn tbv'y tshvry  mr'sh 'mnh mr'sh shnyr vchrmvn mm'nvt 'ryvt mhrry nmrym
lbbtny 'chty khlh lbbtyny [b'chd kh] (b'cht q) m'ynykh b'chd 'nq mtsvrnykh
mh-yfv ddykh 'chty khlh mh-tbv ddykh myyn vrych shmnykh mkhl-bshmym
nft ttfnh shftvtykh khlh dbsh vchlb tcht lshvnkh vrych shlmtykh khrych lbnvn    s
gn  n'vl 'chty khlh gl n'vl m'yn chtvm
shlchykh frds rmvnym 'm fry mgdym khfrym 'm-nrdym
nrd  vkhrkhm qnh vqnmvn 'm khl-'tsy lbvnh mr v'hlvt 'm khl-r'shy bshmym
m'yn gnym b'r mym chyym vnzlym mn-lbnvn
'vry tsfvn vbv'y tymn hfychy gny yzlv bshmyv yb' dvdy lgnv vy'khl fry mgdyv
b'ty lgny 'chty khlh 'ryty mvry 'm-bshmy 'khlty y'ry 'm-dbshy shtyty yyny 'm-chlby 'khlv r'ym shtv vshkhrv dvdym    s
'ny yshnh vlby 'r qvl  dvdy dvfq ftchy-ly 'chty r'yty yvnty tmty shr'shy nml'-tl qvtsvty rsysy lylh
fshtty 't-khtnty 'ykhkhh 'lbshnh rchtsty 't-rgly 'ykhkhh 'tnfm
dvdy shlch ydv mn-hchr vm'y hmv 'lyv
qmty 'ny lftch ldvdy vydy ntfv-mvr v'tsb'ty mvr 'br 'l khfvt hmn'vl
ftchty 'ny ldvdy vdvdy chmq 'br nfshy yts'h bdbrv bqshtyhv vl' mts'tyhv qr'tyv vl' 'nny
mts'ny hshmrym hsbbym b'yr hkhvny fts'vny nsh'v 't-rdydy m'ly shmry hchmvt
hshb'ty 'tkhm bnvt yrvshlm 'm-tmts'v 't-dvdy mh-tgydv lv shchvlt 'hbh 'ny
mh-dvdkh mdvd hyfh bnshym mh-dvdkh mdvd shkhkhh hshb'tnv
dvdy tsch v'dvm dgvl mrbbh
r'shv khtm fz qvtsvtyv  tltlym shchrvt kh'vrb
'ynyv khyvnym 'l-'fyqy mym rchtsvt bchlb yshbvt 'l-ml't
lchyv kh'rvgt hbshm mgdlvt mrqchym shftvtyv shvshnym ntfvt mvr 'br
ydyv glyly zhb mml'ym btrshysh m'yv 'sht shn m'lft sfyrym
shvqyv 'mvdy shsh mysdym 'l-'dny-fz mr'hv khlbnvn bchvr kh'rzym
chkhv mmtqym vkhlv mchmdym zh dvdy vzh r'y bnvt yrvshlm
'nh hlkh dvdkh hyfh bnshym 'nh fnh dvdkh vnbqshnv 'mkh
dvdy yrd lgnv l'rvgvt hbshm lr'vt bgnym vllqt shvshnym
'ny ldvdy vdvdy ly hr'h bshvshnym    s
yfh 't r'yty khtrtsh n'vh khyrvshlm 'ymh khndglvt
hsby 'ynykh mngdy shhm  hrhybny sh'rkh kh'dr h'zym shglshv mn-hgl'd
shnykh kh'dr hrchlym sh'lv mn-hrchtsh shkhlm mt'ymvt vshkhlh 'yn bhm
khflch hrmvn rqtkh mb'd ltsmtkh
shshym hmh mlkhvt vshmnym fylgshym v'lmvt 'yn msfr
'cht hy' yvnty tmty 'cht hy' l'mh brh hy' lyvldth r'vh bnvt vy'shrvh mlkhvt vfylgshym vyhllvh    s
my-z't hnshqfh khmv-shchr yfh khlbnh brh khchmh 'ymh khndglvt    s
'l-gnt 'gvz yrdty lr'vt b'by hnchl lr'vt hfrchh hgfn hntsv hrmnym
l' yd'ty nfshy shmtny mrkhbvt 'my-ndyb
shvby shvby hshvlmyt shvby shvby vnchzh-bkh mh-tchzv bshvlmyt khmchlt hmchnym
mh-yfv f'mykh bn'lym bt-ndyb chmvqy yrkhykh khmv chl'ym m'shh ydy 'mn
shrrkh 'gn hshr 'l-ychsr hmzg btnkh 'rmt chtym svgh bshvshnym
shny shdykh khshny 'frym t'my tsbyh
tsv'rkh khmgdl hshn 'ynykh brkhvt bchshbvn 'l-sh'r bt-rbym 'fkh khmgdl hlbnvn tsvfh fny dmshq
r'shkh 'lykh khkhrml vdlt r'shkh kh'rgmn mlkh 'svr brhtym
mh-yfyt vmh-n'mt 'hbh bt'nvgym
z't qvmtkh dmth ltmr vshdykh l'shkhlvt
'mrty ''lh btmr 'chzh bsnsnyv vyhyv-n' shdykh kh'shkhlvt hgfn vrych  'fkh khtfvchym
vchkhkh khyyn htvb hvlkh ldvdy lmyshrym dvbb shfty yshnym
'ny ldvdy v'ly tshvqtv    s
lkhh dvdy nts' hshdh nlynh bkhfrym
nshkhymh lkhrmym nr'h 'm frchh hgfn ftch hsmdr hntsv hrmvnym shm 'tn 't-ddy lkh
hdvd'ym ntnv-rych v'l-ftchynv khl-mgdym chdshym gm-yshnym dvdy tsfnty lkh
my ytnkh kh'ch ly yvnq shdy 'my 'mts'kh bchvts 'shqkh gm l'-ybvzv ly
'nhgkh 'by'kh 'l-byt 'my tlmdny 'shqkh myyn hrqch m'sys rmny
shm'lv tcht r'shy vymynv tchbqny
hshb'ty 'tkhm bnvt yrvshlm mh-t'yrv  vmh-t'rrv 't-h'hbh 'd shtchfts    s
my z't 'lh mn-hmdbr mtrfqt 'l-dvdh tcht htfvch 'vrrtykh mh chbltkh 'mkh shmh chblh yldtkh
shymny khchvtm 'l-lbkh khchvtm 'l-zrv'kh khy-'zh khmvt 'hbh qshh khsh'vl qn'h rshfyh rshfy 'sh shlhbtyh
mym rbym l' yvkhlv lkhbvt 't-h'hbh vnhrvt l' yshtfvh 'm-ytn 'ysh 't-khl-hvn bytv b'hbh bvz ybvzv lv    s
'chvt lnv qtnh vshdym 'yn lh mh-n'shh l'chtnv byvm shydbr-bh
'm-chvmh hy' nbnh 'lyh tyrt khsf v'm-dlt hy' ntsvr 'lyh lvch 'rz
'ny chvmh vshdy khmgdlvt 'z hyyty b'ynyv khmvts't shlvm  f
khrm hyh lshlmh bb'l hmvn ntn 't-hkhrm lntrym 'ysh yb' bfryv 'lf khsf
khrmy shly lfny h'lf lkh shlmh vm'tym lntrym 't-fryv
hyvshbt bgnym chbrym mqshybym lqvlkh hshmy'yny
brch  dvdy vdmh-lkh ltsby 'v l'fr h'ylym 'l hry bshmym
